'''zamopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylolite|xylolite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylolite|xylolite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zamopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæmepeth|zæmepeth]] || [[word:zæmepej|zæmepej]] || [[word:zæmepesh|zæmepesh]] || [[word:zæmepe|zæmepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zamomopoth|zamomopoth]] || [[word:zamomopoj|zamomopoj]] || [[word:zamomoposh|zamomoposh]] || [[word:zamomopo|zamomopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zamopoth|zamopoth]] || [[word:zamopoj|zamopoj]] || [[word:zamoposh|zamoposh]] || [[word:zamopo|zamopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zamofpoth|zamofpoth]] || [[word:zamofpoj|zamofpoj]] || [[word:zamofposh|zamofposh]] || [[word:zamofpof|zamofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zamopotho|zamopotho]] || [[word:zamopojo|zamopojo]] || [[word:zamoposho|zamoposho]] || [[word:zamopoko|zamopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zamopoth|zamopoth]] || [[word:zamopoj|zamopoj]] || [[word:zamoposh|zamoposh]] || [[word:zamopo|zamopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zamopothol|zamopothol]] || [[word:zamopojol|zamopojol]] || [[word:zamoposhol|zamoposhol]] || [[word:zamopokol|zamopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zamopothotho|zamopothotho]] || [[word:zamopojojo|zamopojojo]] || [[word:zamoposhosho|zamoposhosho]] || [[word:zamopoko|zamopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zamopothon|zamopothon]] || [[word:zamopojon|zamopojon]] || [[word:zamoposhon|zamoposhon]] || [[word:zamopokon|zamopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zamopothoro|zamopothoro]] || [[word:zamopojoro|zamopojoro]] || [[word:zamoposhoro|zamoposhoro]] || [[word:zamopokoro|zamopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
